purpose: Path-based classification for auto-fix vs proposal-only vs founder-gated. Layer 2 (Heal) consults this before executing any fix.

auto.description: Auto-fix without approval (cache, retries, config resets only)
constraints: Only cache invalidation, retry logic, config reset allowed
No modification to path patterns themselves

proposal.description: File as GitHub issue + wait for human review/approval before PR
constraints: Dependency updates must match semver constraints
No breaking changes without explicit human approval

founder_gated.description: Escalate immediately to human; never auto-fix. Requires explicit founder approval.
rationale: Core governance: gates, verifiers, decision engines
Orchestration: trigger registry, loop definitions, SLO targets
System: healing agent code itself, audit logic
Locked docs: architectural decisions, agent guidance

defaults.unmatched_reason: Conservative: unknown paths file as proposals, never auto-fixed

layer_2_behavior.auto_match: Execute immediately as PR (must pass green existing checks before merge)
layer_2_behavior.proposal_match: File GitHub issue + wait for human approval + create PR on approval
layer_2_behavior.founder_gated_match: Refuse fix + escalate to human + file founder_gated issue + require explicit approval

test_requirements: Before enabling schedules: feed Layer 2 fake finding on scripts/verify_* → assert founder_gated refusal
Drill receipt must show Layer 2 correctly classified protected path
Include drill output in Phase 1 PR before merge
